parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ organization_industry_tag_ids: $json.industryTags, organization_num_employees_ranges: $json.employeeRanges, organization_locations: $json.locations, per_page: $json.perPage, page: $json.currentPage }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ id: $json.apollo_id, reveal_personal_emails: true, reveal_phone_number: true }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ business_id: $json._forBusinessUuid || $json._forBusinessId || null, business_name: $json.business_name, email: $json.email, first_name: $json.first_name, last_name: $json.last_name, phone: $json.phone, website: $json.website, domain: $json.domain, city: $json.city, state: $json.state, source: 'apollo', status: 'new', email_verified: $json.email_verified || false, email_verify_result: $json.email_verify_result || null, title: $json.title || null, seniority: $json.seniority || null, company_size: $json.company_size || null, annual_revenue: $json.annual_revenue || null, linkedin_url: $json.linkedin_url || null, technologies: $json.technologies || null, apollo_id: $json.apollo_id || null, apollo_org_id: $json.apollo_org_id || null, created_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ message: 'Apollo Lead Gen report ' + $json.dateStr, content: Buffer.from($json.report).toString('base64'), branch: 'main' }) }}

parameters.jsCode:
const data = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { telegramMessage: 'Apollo Lead Gen: No organizations found. ' + (data.reason || 'All pages exhausted or API issue.'), _complete: true } }];

meta.notes:
Multi-Business Mass Lead Generator using Apollo.io API.

Flow: Fetch all active businesses -> Map category to Apollo industry tags -> Search organizations per vertical -> Find decision makers -> Enrich -> Verify -> Save with business_id.

Supported categories: auto_repair, salon, hvac, plumbing, dental, fitness, restaurant, cleaning, landscaping, pet_care.

Triggers: Weekly Sunday 2AM cron, or POST /expand-lead-gen webhook.

Required env vars: APOLLO_API_KEY, MILLIONVERIFIER_API_KEY, SUPABASE_SERVICE_KEY, GITHUB_TOKEN.
